name: Integration Planner
description: Reads backend and frontend contracts after the hard-barrier sync and produces the integration wiring plan: env vars, shared types, API client generation.

checks.prompt: Review the monorepo packages directory and identify the points where backend and frontend need to connect: shared types, API base URL, auth token handling. List exactly 4 integration touch-points.

Generate the integration wiring plan: (1) list shared TypeScript types to extract to a packages/shared package. (2) list 3 environment variables both frontend and backend need. (3) recommended API client generation approach. Context: {retryContext}
